revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 27 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月27日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 27일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 27 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿七]][[zh:四月廿七]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 27|qq=April 27}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 27일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 27''' is the 27th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q298057}} 7th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|599|en|599|qid=Q34050|lt=599 AD|1=599}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}} ) – The {{ill|Suiko Earthquake|ja|推古Earthquake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suiko Earthquake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , the oldest recorded earthquake damage in Japan as noted in the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}} , occurs. * {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|889|en|889|qid=Q23833|lt=889 AD|1=889}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}} ) – An era change from {{ill|Ninna|en|Ninna|qid=Q1346317|lt=Ninwa|1=Ninna}} to Kanpei occurs. * {{ill|Kanna (era)|en|Kanna (era)|qid=Q1327053|lt=Kanwa|1=Kanna (era)}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|985|en|985|qid=Q23414|lt=985 AD|1=985}} {{ill|May 19|en|May 19|qid=Q2578|lt=May 19|1=May 19}} ) – An era change from {{ill|Eikan|en|Eikan|qid=Q1327084|lt=Eikan|1=Eikan}} to Kanwa occurs. * {{ill|Hōen|en|Hōen|qid=Q1193929|lt=Hōen|1=Hōen}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1135|en|1135|qid=Q19594|lt=1135 AD|1=1135}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|qid=Q2615|lt=June 10|1=June 10}} ) – An era change from {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|qid=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō|1=Chōshō}} to Hōen occurs. * {{ill|Hōgen (era)|en|Hōgen (era)|qid=Q1193898|lt=Hōgen|1=Hōgen (era)}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156 AD|1=1156}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}} ) – An era change from {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|qid=Q1194205|lt=Kusu|1=Kyūju}} to Hōgen occurs due to the ascension of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180 AD|1=1180}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – While exiled to Izu’s {{ill|Hirugashima|ja|蛭ヶ小島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirugashima|1=Hirugakojima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625584}} , {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} is informed by his uncle Yukina of the imperial order from {{ill|Prince Mochihito|en|Prince Mochihito|qid=Q1941666|lt=Prince Mochihito|1=Prince Mochihito}} to subdue the Heike. * {{ill|Shōji (era)|en|Shōji (era)|qid=Q1199890|lt=Shōji|1=Shōji (era)}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1199|en|1199|qid=Q19752|lt=1199 AD|1=1199}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}} ) – An era change to Shōji occurs with the ascension of {{ill|Emperor Tsuchimikado|en|Emperor Tsuchimikado|qid=Q357269|lt=Tsuchimikado Tennō|1=Emperor Tsuchimikado}} , prompting an {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Ken'ei|en|Ken'ei|qid=Q1194153|lt=Ken'ei|1=Ken'ei}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1206|en|1206|qid=Q5230|lt=1206 AD|1=1206}} {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|qid=Q2622|lt=June 5|1=June 5}} ) – An era change from {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Motohisa|1=Genkyū}} to Ken'ei occurs. * {{ill|Shōkei|ja|Shōkyō|1=Shōkyō|2=ja|3=正慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōkei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1069086}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333 AD|1=1333}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|qid=Q2615|lt=June 10|1=June 10}} ) – While on campaign in Tanba for the suppression of the anti-government uprising, {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q297107}} , in response to {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Emperor Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} , resolves to launch a rebellion. * {{ill|Kōei|en|Kōei|qid=Q980266|lt=Kōei|1=Kōei}} First Year / {{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|qid=Q1143592|lt=Kokkoku|1=Kōkoku}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1342|en|1342|qid=Q6069|lt=1342 AD|1=1342}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}} ) – The Northern Court, following the {{ill|Ryakuō|en|Ryakuō|qid=Q1146182|lt=Rekio|1=Ryakuō}} , changes the era to Kōei. * {{ill|Shōchō|en|Shōchō|qid=Q1193070|lt=Shōchō|1=Shōchō}} First Year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1428|en|1428|qid=Q6315|lt=1428 AD|1=1428}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|qid=Q2615|lt=June 10|1=June 10}} ) – With the beginning of the reign of {{ill|Emperor Shōkō|en|Emperor Shōkō|qid=Q451827|lt=Emperor Shōkō|1=Emperor Shōkō}} , the era is changed from [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to Shōchō. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} First Year (Leap April) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868 AD|1=1868}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|qid=Q2672|lt=June 17|1=June 17}} ) – Based on the {{ill|Charter Oath|en|Charter Oath|qid=Q702056|lt=Five Articles of Faith|1=Charter Oath}} , the {{ill|Constitutional document|ja|政体書|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Constitutional document|1=Constitutional document|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9334934}} is distributed. == Births == * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku|1=Shōtoku (era)}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716 AD|1=1716}} {{ill|June 16|en|June 16|qid=Q2653|lt=June 16|1=June 16}} ) – {{ill|Hosokawa Munetaka|ja|細川宗孝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Munetaka|1=Hosokawa Munetaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605875}} , the 5th lord of the {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|en|Kumamoto Domain|qid=Q1194248|lt=Kumamoto Domain|1=Kumamoto Domain}} , (+ {{ill|1747|en|1747|qid=Q7596|lt=1747 AD|1=1747}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kanei|1=Kan'ei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1625|en|1625|qid=Q6826|lt=1625 AD|1=1625}} {{ill|June 2|en|June 2|qid=Q2624|lt=June 2|1=June 2}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Terumoto|en|Mōri Terumoto|qid=Q1142657|lt=Mōri Terumoto|1=Mōri Terumoto}} {{Sfn|時山弥八編|1916|p=83|qq=}} , a {{ill|Military commander|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1553|en|1553|qid=Q6568|lt=1553 AD|1=1553}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Komakizuri|ja|駒牽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komakizuri|1=Komahiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11668427}} (in the case of the smaller month)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|26|4|28|3|27|5|4|0427|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
